title: Amtech I8250 10 Piece Female Torx Socket Set
features: DURABLE: This 10 piece female Torx socket set is made from chrome vanadium steel for durability
CONTENTS: The set includes 5 x 6mm (1/4") square drives (E4, E5, E6, E7, E8) and 5 x 9.5mm (3/8") square drives (E10, E12, E14, E16, E18) with a storage rail
MULTI-DRIVE: Compatible with 1/4" and other common drive sizes
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
